changelog: FIX (DEV ONLY): Game cards now show BIG, unmissable scores (38sp font) in the center when available — '2  —  4' between the team logos. Previous design buried the score under the team name where it was getting visually lost. mandatory:true so v1.44.5 / v1.44.6 devices force-update.

Diagnostic breadcrumbs now log every card's status + score values on each composition. If scores still don't show after this update, hit Diagnostics → Send Report and we can see exactly what data the card received.
Backed up by the v1.44.6 changes: 6h live-refresh window, em-dash separator for live-without-scores, elapsed time fallback.
